task: I’m trying to ease into a simple yoga routine here in Fresno and want something that combines one local studio option with one easy at-home session. Could you start on coilyoga.com and look through what Coil Yoga in Fresno offers so I can get a feel for the studio’s vibe, the kinds of classes they teach, and what a beginner might actually be walking into; please make sure you open the actual classes page and pull at least one specific detail from there, and leave that page open so I can look at it later. Then, with that local context in mind, go to toweryogafresno.com and find Tower Yoga Fresno’s schedule, and tell me the next three upcoming classes with their start times so I can see what would realistically fit into my week; if possible, open the schedule in its own tab and keep it visible as proof of the class times. After that, head to YouTube and search for “50 minute yin yoga,” then compare the visible results and pick the one with the highest view count so I have a home practice to pair with the studio option; open the actual video page, tell me the title, channel, and view count, and leave the video tab open so I can reference it. Once you’ve seen all three sites, give me a short beginner-friendly recommendation on whether Coil Yoga or Tower Yoga seems like the better starting point for me based on what you found, and pair that choice with the YouTube session as a simple Fresno yoga starter plan.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully navigated to the Coil Yoga website and accessed the classes page (confirmed by the URL `https://coilyoga.com/classes/` and the content retrieved in step 7-11). The agent provided a summary of the studio's offerings (community-oriented, focus on breath/movement), class types (Vinyasa, Restorative, Somatic Experiencing), and included a specific detail from the classes page (the recommendation to try "Intro to Yoga Basics" or "Restorative classes" for beginners). The requirement to leave the page open was also met.

R2: success - The agent successfully navigated to the Tower Yoga Fresno schedule page. Through the use of the site's interactive schedule (which required filtering by region to show both locations), the agent identified the next three upcoming classes as:
1. Wed, May 27, 6:00 AM: Low Heat Vinyasa (The Mandala)
2. Wed, May 27, 9:30 AM: Hot Power (The Mandala)
3. Wed, May 27, 11:00 AM: Hot Vinyasa (The Mandala)
These times were correctly extracted and reported in the final summary. The schedule page was left open in the browser as requested.

R3: success - The agent performed a search for "50 minute yin yoga" on YouTube. It identified a video titled "YIN YOGA | 50 minutes deep relax | full body stretch and opening" by the channel "melina ophelia". The agent verified the view count (1,886,232) and opened the video page, leaving it open for the user. The agent successfully compared results and reported the required details (title, channel, and view count) in its final summary.

R4: success - The agent successfully evaluated both studio websites. It identified that Coil Yoga provides specific beginner-friendly recommendations (Intro to Yoga Basics, Beginning level, Restorative classes) and a community-focused vibe. It also reviewed the Tower Yoga schedule, noting that the upcoming classes were primarily "Hot" or "Power" vinyasa sessions. Based on this, the agent explicitly recommended Coil Yoga as the better starting point for a beginner, citing the studio's specific beginner-friendly offerings compared to Tower's more intense schedule.

R5: success - The agent successfully identified a local studio (Coil Yoga) and provided a recommendation based on its beginner-friendly offerings (Restorative/Beginning classes). It also identified a specific YouTube video ("YIN YOGA | 50 minutes deep relax | full body stretch and opening" by melina ophelia) and integrated these two components into a coherent, beginner-friendly starter plan for the user. The plan explicitly pairs the studio recommendation with the at-home session.
